title: Portuguese Danmuji Casserole
description: A spicy and flavorful casserole recipe that combines the intense peppery taste of danmuji with the richness of a portuguese-inspired dish.
instructions: Cook the Portuguese sausage in a pan over medium heat until browned. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same pan, cook the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the danmuji, intense pepper, and cooked sausage to the pan. Stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix the casserole sauce and shredded cheese.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange half of the bread crumbs in the bottom.
Add the danmuji mixture on top of the bread crumbs.
Pour the casserole sauce mixture over the danmuji mixture.
Top with the remaining bread crumbs.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
